overview: The Sovereign Monad Control Center is the operational OS layer for a self-governing, philosophically-grounded multi-agent ecosystem. It provides real-time observability and control across 15 architectural layers — monitoring three improvement agents (Synapse, Vox, Pneuma), six institutional organs, system integrity via the Gnosis Integrity Layer, build pipeline progress, and deployment orchestration. The first specialized control center for integrity-focused, multi-agent ecosystem governance.
features: Six core advanced panels: Integrity Auditor, Build Pipeline Tracker, Kafka Wiring Diagram, Skills Matrix, Cost Estimator, Deployment Orchestration
15-layer sidebar navigation using ecosystem's own terminology
Three improvement agent monitoring: Synapse, Vox, Pneuma with live integrity scores
Gnosis Integrity Layer with axiom drift detection
Fixed Kafka event topology visualization (agent-to-topic map)
Agent skills matrix with shared capability highlighting
Interactive infrastructure cost estimator (cycles, RPC, gas)
Step-by-step deployment orchestration with Docker Compose guidance
Real-time system metrics (CPU, Memory, Uptime) with configurable thresholds
Refined cyberpunk aesthetic: dark #0A0A0A background, cyan/magenta/amber accents
